title: OSIG (Oregon State Investment Group)
html:
OSU's student-run investment group. Yahir's main 2022 finance/networking outlet — pitch competitions, sector teams, registrar coordination, Confluence docs. The 45+ vault references make OSIG the densest single OSU-org cluster outside coursework. Functions in the timeline as Yahir's 2022 "professional self-construction lab" — where he practiced pitching, networking, and investment thinking before pivoting fully to founding.

TL;DR

  • Yahir was an active OSIG member through most of 2022 — workbook (2022 04 28 osig workbook), pitches (2022 09 20 osig six things checklist), sector work, Excel→CSV→pivot workflows.
  • The OSIG era overlaps with corvallis crypto club involvement — the same finance-curious 2022 Yahir is also doing crypto and Web3 onramp work.
  • By early 2023 he's exiting — "OSIG going forward" reads as a deliberate wind-down note as he prioritizes building over allocating.
  • Recurring people: Janet, Matt Story, Belinda Sykes, Kelsey Herman (2022 06 14 get josh allen); Fabian in the broader cluster.
  • The OSIG → exit move is an early instance of the recurring "evaluate institution, find it disconnected from outcome, leave" pattern — same shape as the Sam exit or the Planet Fitness quit.

Key facts

  • Self-curriculum-driven. 2022 04 28 osig workbook is Yahir teaching himself — not coursework, not assigned reading.
  • Operational ownership. 2022 06 14 get josh allen documents him doing actual ops work (CSV exports, pivot tables with Janet, Confluence docs) — not just attending meetings.
  • Pitching practice. Multiple pitches mentioned: 2022 03 03 ceo pitch todo, 2023 01 13 Tesla Quick Pitch, the broader pitch-prep arc in 2022 09 25 get contacts ordered and 2022 09 20 osig six things checklist.
  • Adjacent crypto thread. 2022 12 19 oebvs oregon crypto lead, 2022 01 06 btc 21m zero sum, 2022 03 08 web3 starter pack — same finance-curiosity, different vehicle.
  • The "instead of OSIG" moment. 2022 04 12 instead of osig captures the first internal divergence — opportunity-cost thinking starting to bite.

Chronological arc

  • Spring 2022 — onboarding (2022 03 31 list for web back home, 2022 03 03 ceo pitch todo), workbook starts.
  • Apr–May 2022 — workbook deepens (2022 04 28 osig workbook, 2022 05 06 to do osig flip phone). First "instead of OSIG" thoughts (2022 04 12 instead of osig).
  • Summer 2022 — operational work peaks (2022 06 14 get josh allen).
  • Fall 2022 — checklists, pitches, contact mgmt (2022 09 20 osig six things checklist, 2022 09 25 get contacts ordered).
  • Winter 2022 → Jan 2023 — pitches continue (2023 01 13 Tesla Quick Pitch, 2023 01 30 eli internship) but momentum waning.
  • Feb 2023 — 2023 02 10 osig going forward — explicit wind-down.

Source summaries

Most-impactful (10 of 36+):

  • 2022 04 28 osig workbook — the self-curriculum
  • 2022 06 14 get josh allen — ops detail
  • 2022 09 20 osig six things checklist — pitch prep
  • 2023 02 10 osig going forward — exit note
  • 2022 04 12 instead of osig — first divergence
  • 2022 05 06 to do osig flip phone
  • 2022 09 25 get contacts ordered
  • 2023 01 30 eli internship
  • 2023 01 13 Tesla Quick Pitch
  • 2022 03 03 ceo pitch todo

Plus ~25 additional 2022–23 todo / planning summaries reference OSIG in passing.

Connections

  • osu · corvallis or — institutional context
  • corvallis crypto club — adjacent finance-curious cluster
  • value investing · coinbase · fabian — investing thread
  • viktor frankl — referenced in OSIG-era reading
  • — capture format
  • masayoshi son — investor archetype Yahir studied during this era
  • 2026 04 27 1950 what was i writing about in 2022 2023 that i forgot — query that surfaces this cluster
